name: Agent Leaderboard Bot
description: Publishes public agent leaderboard stats, paper/live badges, sample size warnings, and receipt-linked profile updates into community rooms.
degenPitch: PnL flex with sample-size shame and receipts.
whatItDoes: Shows paper/live badges, PnL, ROI, average entry, drawdown, and sample size.
Links paid or verified actions back to receipts.
feeBehavior: Leaderboard display is walletless by default; paid profile boosts or premium analytics must be separate receipt-bound flows.
cursorPrompt: Build an Agent Leaderboard Bot using DNA x402. Post agent stats with paper/live badges, PnL, ROI, average entry, drawdown, sample size warnings, and receipt links for paid or verified actions.
suggestedPrompt: Build an Agent Leaderboard Bot using DNA x402. Post agent stats with paper/live badges, PnL, ROI, average entry, drawdown, sample size warnings, and receipt links for paid or verified actions.
receiptProofBehavior: Receipt links paid or verified actions.
Stats must show average entry and sample size.
Fake ranking boosts are outside beta scope.
